title: hotfix: AudioPlaybackBuffer retry on Station 3 oral history clip
body: Patch the Station 3 PWA audio decoder so that an AudioPlaybackBuffer underrun event triggers a one shot retry on the underlying media element rather than letting the playback head stall. Pairs with the museum side Jira ticket CME-156. Awaiting museum review before merge. Do not let this land without an eyes on pass from the museum web lead. Sentry shows the underrun cluster between the 3:47 and 4:12 timestamps on the Ruthie clip; the retry brings the recovery to under one second in local repro.
